name: cut-tracker
description: Personal cut dashboard — lose fat, keep muscle. Single-file app, no dependencies.

scripts.build:www: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.webmanifest sw.js apple-touch-icon.png icon-192.png icon-512.png www/ && cp node_modules/@capacitor/core/dist/capacitor.js www/
scripts.ios: npm run build:www && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/patch-ios-config.js && npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/patch-ios-config.js
